privileged_info_summary: DreamPlan by NCH Software is real commercial home design software running on Windows 11. The task requires creating an electrical plan for a kitchen in 2D Blueprint view with six electrical symbols: 4 Standard Outlets, 1 Switch, and 1 High Voltage Outlet. DreamPlan confirms support for 2D Blueprint view and Add Symbols tool for placing architectural symbols. The sample project is 'Contemporary House' (internally referenced as 'Sample House' in tasks). CRITICAL ISSUES: (1) Task hooks reference setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 files that do NOT EXIST in the task directory - these files are missing entirely; (2) Project path pattern specifies .dpp file extension, but DreamPlan's native format is .DDP; (3) Specific electrical symbol types (Standard Outlet, Switch, High Voltage) are not verified in public DreamPlan documentation - their availability and naming conventions are unconfirmed. Task has 8-minute timeout (480 seconds), 40-step limit, and medium difficulty with sparse rewards.
